english translation text: In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
O Allah: (please do) prolong my lifetime,
And make me attain my hopes,

arabic text: وَإِنْ كُنْتُ مِنَ الأَشْقِيَاءِ فَامْحُنِي مِنَ الأَشْقِيَاءِ
english translation text: And if I am written with the unhappy ones, (please) erase my name from this list,
And write it with the happy ones,

arabic text: فَإِنّكَ قُلْتَ فِي كِتَابِكَ المُنْزَلِ عَلَى نَبِيّكَ المُرْسَلِ
english translation text: For You have said in Your Book that You revealed to Your missioned Prophet,
Your peace be upon him and his Household:

arabic text: (يَمْحُو اللّهُ مَايَشَاءُ وَيُثْبِتُ وَعِنْدَهُ أُمّ الكِتَابِ)
english translation text: “Allah makes to pass away and establishes what He pleases, and with Him is the basis of the Book.”
